mentions.note: Down 11% despite big order anticipation; stocks don't move linearly upward; be careful chasing momentum in aerospace names.
Diagnostics company with compelling business model; Cramer approval despite unconventional name; solid entry point for growth investors.
AI accelerator technology compelling (15x faster than GPU for inference, $20B OpenAI deal), but IPO mania valuation at 187x sales vs. Nvidia 26x unjustifiable; wait for 50%+ pullback.
Chuck Robbins showing incredible acceleration in sales and earnings; 13% daily rally completely justified under new internet buildout; not mania like 1999.
Pure speculative play with binary outcomes; can lose everything or double; insufficient conviction to recommend without more data.
Aerospace exposure under Larry Culp leadership; mid-range stock presents suitable entry point; not pushed up by order anticipation mania like Boeing.
CEO Matt Murphy executing optical business acquisition strategy effectively; stock up 200%+ from when Murphy bought at $70; much cheaper than Cerebras despite similar semiconductor exposure.
Memory shortage plays justified; not overvalued provided Chinese don't flood markets with cheap DRAM and NAND.
Trading cheaper than S&P 500 average on forward earnings despite 65% YoY growth and dominant AI accelerator position; disciplined value buy versus Cerebras and spec plays.
Strong fundamentals underpriced due to AI displacement fears; 16% annual bottom-line growth, 14-15% revenue acceleration, diversified revenue streams offset market pessimism.
Memory controller design company with Micron exposure; volatile but solid play on memory demand; accumulate on pullbacks.
High-bandwidth memory chip supplier with $35.5B quarterly revenue; real business with $1T market cap not overvalued versus speculative alternatives.
Storage supplier benefiting from data center expansion; not overvalued on shortage and buildout rationale.
Data center HVAC leader with 24% Q1 order growth, record $10.7B backlog, 40% commercial HVAC bookings surge; 7,000-tech force enables 24/7 commissioning; pipeline most robust ever.
Storage player in favorable position with data center buildout; valuations justified by fundamentals and capacity constraints.
Geopolitical uncertainty in Gulf region where company invested heavily; wait for clarity on situation before committing capital.
